scripts.docker:restart: npm run docker:down && npm run docker:up
scripts.docker:wait: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); let ready = false; while (!ready) { try { execSync('docker exec receitas_mysql mysql -uroot -proot -e \"USE teste_receitas_rg_sistemas; SHOW TABLES;\"', { stdio: 'ignore' }); ready = true; console.log('Banco de dados pronto!'); } catch { console.log('Aguardando banco finalizar setup...'); Atomics.wait(new Int32Array(new SharedArrayBuffer(4)), 0, 0, 2000); } }"
scripts.prisma:pull: echo Sincronizando schema Prisma... && prisma db pull
scripts.prisma:generate: echo Gerando Prisma Client... && prisma generate
scripts.prisma:sync: npm run prisma:pull && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.setup: npm run docker:restart && npm run docker:wait && npm run prisma:sync && echo Ambiente configurado com sucesso!
